title: RESPect iEEG ECoG Dataset of Epilepsy Surgery Patients
label: RESPect
description: Intracranial EEG recordings of 6 epilepsy surgery patients with acute intraoperative ECoG organized in BIDS RESPect dataset.
patient_criteria: Epilepsy surgery patients in Utrecht UMC undergoing intraoperative ECoG.
target_variables: iEEG signal features tied to seizure localization and surgical resection boundaries.
acquisition_methods: Data collected via MicroMed SD64 or Flexi EEG amplifiers
privacy_compliance: De-identified per OpenNeuro and BIDS iEEG standards.

ethics_approval.details: Clinical ethics approval obtained at UMC Utrecht.

patient_consent.details: Informed consent obtained per clinical protocol.

citation: Demuru et al. (2021) A Practical Workflow for Organizing Clinical Intraoperative and Long‑Term iEEG data in BIDS. Submitted to Neuroinformatics.
